languages.original_text: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

languages.text: "Лично мне просто... непривычно думать, что Патента нет на своем месте. Я так привыкла к его сущестывованию, словно он сросся с самим судном".
"Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."
languages.original_text: "Лично мне просто... непривычно думать, что Патента нет на своем месте. Я так привыкла к его сущестывованию, словно он сросся с самим судном".

"Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."
"Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

languages.text: 「個人的な感想ですが、保証書が本来あるべき場所にないという考えに、私はただ不安に感じます。保証書の存在に慣れ親しんでいるので、まるで船そのものの一部のように感じます」
languages.original_text: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

traits.locale_text: 「個人的な感想ですが、保証書が本来あるべき場所にないという考えに、私はただ不安に感じます。保証書の存在に慣れ親しんでいるので、まるで船そのものの一部のように感じます。」

languages.text: « Personnellement, je me sens juste... mal à l'aise en sachant que la lettre de marque n'est pas à sa place. Je suis trop habituée à sa présence, comme si elle faisait partie intégrante du vaisseau. »
languages.original_text: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

traits.locale_text: « Personnellement, je me sens juste... mal à l'aise en sachant que la lettre de marque n'est pas à sa place. Je suis trop habituée à sa présence, comme si elle faisait partie intégrante du vaisseau. »

languages.text: "Mir persönlich ... behagt der Gedanke nicht, dass der Handelsbrief nicht dort ist, wo er sein sollte. Ich habe mich so an seine Existenz gewöhnt, dass er mit dem Schiff selbst verschmolzen zu sein scheint."
languages.original_text: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

traits.locale_text: "Mir persönlich ... behagt der Gedanke nicht, dass der Handelsbrief nicht dort ist, wo er sein sollte. Ich habe mich so an seine Existenz gewöhnt, dass er mit dem Schiff selbst verschmolzen zu sein scheint."

languages.text: "Şahsen ben sadece... Ruhsatname'nin olması gereken yerde olmadığı düşüncesinden huzursuzum. Varlığına o kadar alışmışım ki sanki geminin kendisiyle bütünleşmiş gibi."
languages.original_text: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

traits.locale_text: "Şahsen ben sadece... Ruhsatname'nin olması gereken yerde olmadığı düşüncesinden huzursuzum. Varlığına o kadar alışmışım ki sanki geminin kendisiyle bütünleşmiş gibi."

languages.text: «Personalmente, me incomoda la idea de que la Patente no esté donde debe. Estoy tan acostumbrada a su existencia que es como si se hubiese fusionado con la propia nave».
languages.original_text: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

traits.locale_text: «Personalmente, me incomoda la idea de que la Patente no esté donde debe. Estoy tan acostumbrada a su existencia que es como si se hubiese fusionado con la propia nave».

languages.text: “就我个人而言，我只是……一想到贸易授状不在它该在的地方，就心神不宁。我太习惯它的存在了，在我看来，它与舰船已融为一体。”
languages.original_text: "Personally, I'm just... uneasy at the thought of the Warrant not being where it's supposed to be. I'm so used to its existence, it's like it's fused with the ship itself."

traits.locale_text: “就我个人而言，我只是……一想到贸易授状不在它该在的地方，就心神不宁。我太习惯它的存在了，在我看来，它与舰船已融为一体。”
